overview: SafeRide is a mobile-first ride-sharing MVP focused on safety, affordability, and trust. Passengers and drivers can sign up, set up profiles, and book rides with full transparency — preset landmark-based pickup/dropoff, gender-filtered ride types, live driver verification, and SOS emergency support built in.
features: Passenger and driver accounts with profile photos and verification
Women-only and general ride options with gender preference filtering
Preset landmark-based pickup and dropoff points
Transparent per-passenger fare preview before booking
Pre-booking driver safety card (name, photo, vehicle, rating, verification)
Active ride view with static map and SOS emergency button
Mutual post-ride ratings (passenger rates driver, driver rates passenger)
Ride history with full trip summaries and type filters
Emergency contacts management for SOS scenarios
Full dark mode support across all pages
